asset_name: Press Start 2P Style Font Atlas (45 glyphs, 8px grid)
shared_properties: Every glyph sits on an 8x8 px grid so timer text and overlays stay pixel-perfect at the authored UI size.
Core palette metadata remains primary #3B3347, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39 while font colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Glyph strokes remain 1 px thick with no anti-aliased diagonals or half-pixel curves.
differences: Atlas covers the exact glyph set needed for A-Z, 0-9, colon, period, dash, slash, plus sign, question mark, and space.
Primary fill uses #D6D0C4 while optional accent strokes use #E07B39 for title and highlight text.
Spacing is tuned for short UI strings such as MM:SS, PAUSED, ESCAPED, BEST, and RESTART.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 8 px UI font size, menu copy, and timer presentation required by the GDD.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the retro pixel UI mood so typography matches the dungeon presentation instead of feeling modern.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the player-facing readability standard so critical state text remains legible above the action layer.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle for static HUD art and SpriteSheetBundle for multi-state overlays and gauges that swap atlas indices.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load UI textures during the shared Loading state and store handles in a HudVisualRegistry keyed by asset_key so gameplay systems never parse filenames.
runtime_notes: Anchor UI nodes to whole pixels in the 1280x720 output space while the gameplay layer is upscaled from 320x180.
Keep the friction gauge, HP strip, and timer on a dedicated HUD layer above parallax and hazard sprites.
Swap overlay states by atlas index or visibility flags instead of rebuilding UI trees during pause, fail, or clear transitions.

context.usage: Shared glyph sheet for timer, pause menu, game-over panel, and clear panel text.

acceptance_criteria: Font atlas is exactly 120x24 px with 45 glyph cells of 8x8 px arranged in 15 columns and 3 rows.
All glyph strokes are 1 px thick and remain readable at native 8 px height with no anti-aliasing.
Atlas contains every glyph needed for MM:SS, PAUSED, ESCAPED, SLIP DOWN, BEST, CONTINUE, RESTART, and QUIT.
